Flooring Outlet TX

Houston's premier flooring destination for tile, hardwood, LVP, carpet, and natural stone. Serving the Greater Houston area since 1998.

MAPEI Professional

Planipatch

$13.99 $19.99

Fast-setting, polymer-modified, cement-based patching compound designed for preparing and smoothing interior subfloors before installing finished flooring.

Bag Size 25 lb / 11.3 kg
Coverage / Depth Up to 1/2 in. floor patching
Use On Concrete, plywood, prepared vinyl
Performance Rapid setting, installer-ready workflow
  • Excellent for smoothing and filling minor surface imperfections before installing new flooring.
  • May be used for patching, skimcoating, feather finishing, and embossing leveler applications.
  • Can be mixed with Planipatch Plus additive when additional flexibility is desired.
  • Professional-grade option for fast-turnaround interior floor prep work.
